# Ezri Abraham

> Ph.D. Student in Biology at the California Institute of Technology (Caltech). Synthetic biologist, machine learning researcher, photographer, artist, and musician.

Ezri Abraham is a Ph.D. student in the Wang Lab at Caltech, applying Sidewinder (a novel DNA construction method) to develop smarter biological artificial intelligence. He completed his B.S. in Biology (Minor in Art) at Northeastern University in May 2025, graduating Summa Cum Laude with a 4.0 GPA and Honors in Biology. He is also an award-winning biodesigner, photographer, drummer, and percussionist.

## Pages

- [About](https://ezriabraham.com/about/): Personal introduction, background, and contact links
- [Science](https://ezriabraham.com/science/): Academic and professional history, timeline, and full CV
- [Art](https://ezriabraham.com/art/): Art pieces including silk painting, woodworking, and biodesign
- [Music](https://ezriabraham.com/music/): Drumset and hand percussion recordings and performances
- [Photography](https://ezriabraham.com/photos/): Wildlife, travel, and landscape photography

## Key Facts

- Name: Ezri Abraham
- Current role: Ph.D. Student in Biology, California Institute of Technology (Caltech)
- Lab: Wang Lab (wanglab.caltech.edu)
- Research: Applying Sidewinder DNA construction method to biological artificial intelligence
- Previous: B.S. Biology, Northeastern University (2025), GPA 4.0, Summa Cum Laude
- Thesis: "Engineering a Nanoplastic-Binding Probiotic"
- Biodesign: Finalist and Outstanding Display Award at Biodesign Challenge 2025 (presented at MoMA)
- Project: SquidKid — bioluminescent bioreactor toy simulating Hawaiian bobtail squid symbiosis
- Instruments: Drumset, cajon, congas
- Camera: Nikon D7200
- Email: ezribabraham@gmail.com
- ORCID: 0009-0005-9580-2712
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/ezriabraham
- Website: ezriabraham.com
